title: Expose prefix route lifecycle through Router
description: RouteTarget is re-exported, but Router/RplNode expose no production API to install or remove prefix routes; current tests only manipulate RoutingTable directly. Add the minimal authorized Router integration after prefix-route authorization semantics are resolved.
close_reason: Added minimal authorized_install_prefix_route and authorized_remove_prefix_route to Router/RplNode after 2auf.44.9.12 semantics; RouteTarget+tests in lichen-rpl; no wire changes; cargo test + clippy passed
